title: Disposition rule
description: A declarative rule in the responsibility-map/disposition engine (Phase 4). Rules condition on Axis A/B and modifiers, never on individual scenarios or personas (design principle 3) — dispositions are computed, not hand-tagged. Every rule is an editorial judgment and therefore requires a docs/DECISIONS.md entry (working rule 9).

description.description: Plain-language statement of what responsibility-map condition this rule encodes.

derivation.description: Disposition mappings are always a project judgment call about who holds responsibility for a layer under a given scenario.

decision_ref.description: ID of the corresponding docs/DECISIONS.md entry, e.g. D-014.

condition.description: Matched against a persona tier's axis_a/axis_b/modifiers plus a control's layer/sov_domain. All present keys must match (AND). Two rules matching the same control with different dispositions is a build failure (invariant I1), not silent precedence.

modifier_conditions.description: Free-form key/operator/value checks against a tier's modifiers object, e.g. key_custody != hyok.

wording_variant.description: Selects which text variant of the control's generalized_text to render when disposition = assess (the adapt_wording mechanism is a variant selector inside assess, not a separate disposition).

auto_answer_value.description: The prefilled answer when disposition = auto_answer. Always visible to the user with override allowed (never a silent auto_fail).

rationale.description: Plain-language explanation shown alongside an auto_answer. Required by invariant I5 whenever disposition = auto_answer.

negotiation_opportunity_override.description: Set true/false to override the control record's default negotiation_opportunity flag for this specific rule match.
